methods.name: outputShader
methods.description: Will cause a new GLSL MAT to be created based on the current settings for this MAT. * includeGeoShader - (Keyword, Optional) Set to True if you want a stub geometry shader to be included. * instanceTexturing - (Keyword, Optional) Set to True if you want code that consumes instance textures to be included.

_provenance.fact: scraped from the PbrMAT Class wiki page
